reasoning: The base rate of pilot reports to NUFORC originating from South America is very low. While an example exists from December 2024, NUFORC is primarily US-focused. Even if we generously assume 1 to 2 pilot reports from South America occur each year, the probability of one occurring in any specific single month (June 2025) is around 8-16%. Furthermore, there is a significant filtering effect based on reporting and publishing delays. Since the event must OCCUR in June 2025, any sightings late in the month are unlikely to be reported by the pilot, processed by NUFORC, and added to the official `id=x` database by the required July 1, 2025, Metaculus resolution check. Taking the low base rate of South American pilot reports and multiplying by the probability of a swift reporting/upload turnaround by July 1, the likelihood falls to around 3-5%.
